source_notes: Tigre has no existing morphological analyzer or annotated corpus (confirmed: HornMorpho's Tigre FST loads but produced no successful segmentations for any test word in this environment; the MoVoC paper itself says Ge'ez/Tigre morphemes had to be manually annotated by expert linguists under supervision, which this project cannot responsibly fabricate). This rule set is BOOTSTRAPPED by adapting Tigrinya's documented affixes (rules/tigrinya_rules.json) -- Tigre and Tigrinya are both North Ethio-Semitic languages with substantial cognate morphology -- plus a couple of Tigre-specific negation/conjunction forms noted in comparative Semitic grammars. This is an approximation for bootstrapping purposes only, NOT expert-verified annotation, and should be validated by a Tigre speaker/linguist before being treated as authoritative.
